game_info.title: Geometric Jumper
game_info.concept:
Meet Mr Jump, your new favorite guy! Help him on jumping his way through the different ingenious and tricky levels!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mr-jump/id955157084

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Meet Mr Jump, your new favorite guy! Help him on jumping his way through the different ingenious and tricky levels!

---------------------------------------
App Store Best of 2015!
---------------------------------------

Testimonials:

Touch Arcade 4/5
“This shouldn't be so hard. Famous last words, those are, in that strange world of gaming where we can die again and again. Mr Jump is really, really hard. It doesn't even ease you in, at least compared to other games.”

PocketGamer 7/10
“It's a hateful experience, and you'll probably swear your entire face off while you're playing, but you'll still wrap your clammy palms around your phone and try to get to the end.”

148Apps 4/5
“You’ll keep chipping away at the stage, keen to get further and come across something even harder along the way.”

TechCrunch
“Gameplay is challenging without being infuriating, and rewards the kind of hardcore pattern memorization that made classic titles for Atari and NES so fun to play. It’s also refreshing to see something other than an endless runner manage this kind of one-button simplicity.”

Gamezebo
“Mr Jump Is the Game Everyone Will Be Playing This Month”

Macworld
“Flappy Bird fans, platformer lovers, and masochists alike will enjoy Mr Jump. This free game is already shooting up the App Store charts and with good reason. Go see what all of the fuss is about.”

Test your reflexes, timing, and precision in this fast-paced platform game that’s as simple as it is addicting. Mr. Jump offers endless fun and challenging levels to keep you on your toes.

Features
One-Tap Gameplay: Simple tapping gameplay, very easy to learn but hard to master.
Challenging Levels: Explore a variety of vibrant worlds with unique obstacles.
Compete with Friends: Challenge your friends for the highest score and prove you’re the best jumper.
Catchy Soundtrack: Immerse yourself in the game with catchy music that sticks in your head.
No Wifi mode : Perfect for both online and offline adventures, play with no wifi needed!

Ready to leap into action with 2 times the fun? Download Mister Jump for free now and show off your skills in this fun, addicting, and classic runner and dash adventure! This flappy yet thrilling jump game is a top-tier casual experience, suitable for boys, girls, teens, and adults of all ages.

Jump into cool fun. Jump with Mr. Jump!
game_info.description: Welcome to Geometric Jumper, a fast-paced precision platformer! You control a courageous square dashing through a geometric world filled with treacherous spikes, precarious platforms, and deadly pits. The goal is simple: survive as long as possible and travel the furthest distance. As you progress, the speed increases and the obstacles become more complex. Master the timing of your jumps to conquer the different biomes and achieve a high score!
game_info.controls:
- ENTER: Start the game from the menu
- Arrow Up / Space: Jump (Hold to jump higher)
- ESC: Pause / Resume the game
- R: Restart the game after Game Over

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic physics engine and input responsiveness. This test confirms that gravity, velocity, and jump inputs affect the player entity correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller acts as a "dumb" player that presses the jump key exactly once every second (60 frames). It does not react to obstacles.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character performs a jump arc repeatedly. The test is successful if the player leaves the ground and returns to it (or dies) without physics glitches.

TEST_2.test_description: Validate collision detection and obstacle avoidance logic. This ensures that the game is playable and winnable by an ideal agent.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller uses a raycasting approach to detect obstacles (Spikes, Walls, Gaps) within a dynamic lookahead distance ahead of the player. It triggers a jump immediately upon detection.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player successfully navigates through the initial sequence of obstacles, surviving for at least 2000 distance units. The test passes if the agent avoids immediate death triggers.
